name: Skana
description: Before all other weapons, Tenno master the Skana. This simple blade becomes immensely powerful in the hands of a master. For Tenno, it is the foundation of their fighting style and a pillar of their culture.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Before all other weapons, Tenno master the Skana. This simple blade becomes immensely powerful in the hands of a master. For Tenno, it is the foundation of their fighting style and a pillar of their culture.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies ragdolling prematurely on Skana stealth finishers.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Prisma Skana having incorrect properties.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.additions: Skana Arit Skin by Arsenal (this can be used on any applicable weapon, not just the Skana).

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some weapon trail placements on the Fang and Dual Skanas.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the TennoGen Infested Skana skin not applying properly to the Prisma Skana.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Skana and Skana Prime damage has been increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Prisma Skana not being tradeable.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: Skana series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Skana not sitting properly in the player’s fist.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.1
patchlogs.changes: The Bright Purity Augment Mod can now be used on Skana Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the sound effects for the Skana Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
